name: @enigmurl/monocurl-mcp
description: Docs for the Monocurl animation language, standard library, examples, and CLI usage.

scripts.build: npm run check && esbuild src/index.ts --bundle --platform=node --format=esm --target=node20 --loader:.md=text --loader:.mcs=text --loader:.mcl=text --outfile=dist/index.js && esbuild src/resources.test.ts --bundle --platform=node --format=esm --target=node20 --loader:.md=text --loader:.mcs=text --loader:.mcl=text --outfile=dist/resources.test.js && esbuild src/server.test.ts --bundle --platform=node --format=esm --target=node20 --outfile=dist/server.test.js
scripts.test: npm run build && node --test dist/resources.test.js dist/server.test.js
scripts.prepare:mcpb: npm run build && mcpb validate manifest.json && mcpb pack . ../../dist/monocurl-mcp-node.mcpb
